$schema_comment: Skill-managed runtime baseline. Do NOT hand-edit unless you are bumping the apitest runtime version per apitest.md §5.
name: apitest

breaking_changes.summary: HTTP JSONPath AGW fallback: when PathMode is HTTP and the body is an AGW envelope ({code,data,message}), legacy IDL-style paths like $.BaseResp.StatusCode and $.items are retried as $.code and $.data.items. RPC mode unchanged.
breaking_changes.migration_hint: No generated test changes required. Prefer correct HTTP paths ($.code, $.data.*) in new case.md; fallback keeps old HTTP cases working.

breaking_changes.summary: Add APITEST_MODE transport abstraction (gateway vs local_rpc). Suite uses Transport instead of a hard-coded GatewayClient; gateway mode still requires APITEST_TOKEN, local_rpc mode skips JWT.
breaking_changes.migration_hint: No generated test changes required. Repos needing local Kitex RPC add tests/integration/apitest/local_rpc.go (repo overlay) implementing NewLocalRPCTransport and delete/replace local_rpc_stub.go on sync. Set APITEST_MODE=local_rpc and TARGET_IPPORT or .env host to run.

breaking_changes.summary: Add multi-service .env routing. EnvConfig now supports default_service plus services.<key> bindings, and HTTPRequest/RPCRequest can set Service to route each request to the matching PSM/host/env/branch bundle.
breaking_changes.migration_hint: Existing flat .env files keep working as services.default. For tests that call multiple PSMs, move routing fields under services.<service_key>, set default_service, and emit Service: "<service_key>" on non-default HTTP/RPC requests. Keep auth in auth.yaml.

breaking_changes.summary: Add fixture helpers (UniqueName, NowSec/Milli/Micro, PastSec/Milli/Micro, FutureSec, RandString, RandInt, PickOne, Sample) for dynamic test data construction and per-env business sample lookup.
breaking_changes.migration_hint: Additive only — existing tests keep compiling. New tests should use apitest.UniqueName/Now*/Rand*/PickOne for fields with replay collisions or randomness, and declare a package-level `var envSamples = map[string]map[string]string{...}` plus apitest.Sample(t, env, key, envSamples) for env-specific business values that cannot be chained from a List/Query.

breaking_changes.summary: Path-autonomous spec-directory contract. Generated tests now hard-code the absolute spec directory (resolved via runtime.Caller(0) + relative path) and call NewContextFromSpec(t, specDir). Business auth headers move out of generated Go code into specDir/auth.yaml profiles, addressed via ctx.AuthHeaders() / ctx.AuthHeadersFor(profile). Removed APIs: EnvFromFile, NewContext(t, env). Removed env vars: APITEST_ENV, APITEST_AUTH, APITEST_LOG_DIR (logs always write to specDir/api_test_logs). Only APITEST_TOKEN (paas-gw JWT) remains.
breaking_changes.migration_hint: 1) Replace `env := apitest.EnvFromFile(t); ctx := apitest.NewContext(t, env)` with `ctx := apitest.NewContextFromSpec(t, specDir())` where `specDir()` is a per-package helper using runtime.Caller(0) + filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(thisFile), "<rel-to-FEATURE_DIR/test>"). 2) Move every business auth header literal (Cookie, Hex-Auth-Key, Authorization, Hex-Login-User-Info, ...) from inline `Headers:` maps into `<FEATURE_DIR>/test/auth.yaml` under profiles.default (or named profiles + case_profiles for cases needing different identities); replace inline values with `Headers: ctx.AuthHeaders()` or `Headers: ctx.AuthHeadersFor("<profile>")`. 3) Drop all `export APITEST_ENV=...`, `export APITEST_AUTH=...`, `export APITEST_LOG_DIR=...` lines from CI / docs / per-user shell rc — only `APITEST_TOKEN` is still needed. 4) Generated `.env` files no longer carry test_account/cookie even legacy-shaped — remove those keys.
